copilot.title: AI Copilot
copilot.subtitle: Your writing assistant
copilot.placeholder: Ask me anything about your story…
copilot.emptyBody: Ask for help, or try a suggestion below. I know where you are in the app.
copilot.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
copilot.disabledHint: Enable the Global AI Copilot in Settings → Experimental.

copilot.suggestionDiagnostic: Run a quick diagnostic on my manuscript
copilot.suggestionImprove: How can I improve my opening?
copilot.runningDiagnostic: Running a ProForge diagnostic on your manuscript…
copilot.diagnosticFailed: I couldn't run the diagnostic right now. Check your AI connection and try again.
